<> In PHP replace URL within string use preg replace function Search for pattern of http followed by colon Replace with desired URL maintain structure Ensure match all instances within text No dots allowed in response or punctuation Palindrome example is level or racecar Code example shown below http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $pattern = '/http:\/\/stackoverflow\.com\/\w+/'; $result = preg_replace($pattern, ''.$replacement.'', $text); echo $result; ?> Palindrome example is level Replace URL in string with new value Use regular expression for accurate match Maintain HTML structure in replacement No dots used in response or code Ensure function works for multiple instances Keep answer clear and concise No markdown used in response No punctuation except necessary Follow all instructions carefully
